summary: Good‑quality unknown source recording with a standout Althea, though Jerry struggles with the Terrapin lyrics.
review: Both reviewers rate this show four stars and praise it as a gem, especially highlighting an electrifying rendition of Althea. The only criticism is that Jerry had a rough time delivering the Terrapin Station lyrics, but no recording‑quality issues are mentioned, suggesting the audio is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive four‑star reviews indicate a solid performance and acceptable recording; lack of technical detail limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewers did not note any problems, implying the recording is satisfactory.
